info.name: Uonely Solution Pvt. Ltd. - A Company that provide, infinite solutions. API Documentation
info.description: ECard App API provides endpoints for ECard user authentication, MPIN management, and profile verification.

request.description: Authenticate an ECard user using User ID, Email, or Mobile Number.
Revoke the current user's access token.
Create a new ECard Registration or Customer Registration.

formdata.description: nullable Other city name if city_id is __other__.

request.description: Create a new ECard Registration or Customer Registration.

item.name: Handles the API request and renders the Swagger documentation view.
Handles the OAuth2 callback and retrieves the required file for the redirect.

request.description: Update or set the MPIN for the authenticated user.
Verify the MPIN for the authenticated user.
Fetch list of all active states.
Fetch list of districts for a given state.
Fetch list of cities for a given district.

item.name: QR Code
item.description: APIs for generating and viewing QR codes for ECard users.

request.description:
Generate a QR code for the authenticated user based on their User ID.
If the QR code already exists in the database, it returns the existing URL.
Otherwise, it generates a new one, saves it, and updates the database.

Retrieve the generated QR code image for the authenticated user.
Uses the path stored in the database if available.
Fetch the authenticated user's profile details.

formdata.description: Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters.

request.description: Update the user's profile information including profile image.
Send an OTP to the user's registered mobile number for verification.
Verify the OTP sent to the mobile number.
Send an OTP to the user's registered email address for verification.
Verify the OTP sent to the email address.
Returns the current wallet balance of the authenticated user.
Returns a paginated list of wallet transactions.
Initiates a wallet top-up transaction using the active payment gateway.
Verifies the payment status with the gateway and updates the wallet balance.
